description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.19 Docker image. Define three jobs—build, lint, and test—each running in the default test stage. The build job runs the commands: make all, make, git clone https://gitlab.com/aquachain/bootstraps ../bootstraps, and ./bin/aquachain import ../bootstraps/latest.dat. The lint job is allowed to fail, runs a before_script that enables dotglob, sets GO_FILES=$(find . -iname '*.go' -type f | grep -v /vendor/ | grep -v /build/), and builds the linter with make bin/golangci-lint, then executes make linter. The test job runs echo $(go env GOPATH), CGO_ENABLED=0 go get -v -d -t ./..., and CGO_ENABLED=0 bash testing/test-short-only.bash, with no caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets defined.
